prompt: A factory starts with 12,000 raw units of a component. In the first stage, 15% of the raw units are found to be defective and are discarded. The remaining non-defective units move to the second stage. In this stage, 10% of these units are rejected due to minor aesthetic imperfections, even though they are functional. The units that pass both stages are then used to assemble final products. Each final product requires exactly 7 such units. What is the maximum number of full final products that can be assembled?
